remaining_tasks.name: Complete discuss-phase gray area discussions
remaining_tasks.progress: CLI architecture and Command coverage areas done; Output format and Socket discovery still to discuss

remaining_tasks.name: Write CONTEXT.md from all discussion decisions

decisions.decision: Rust binary via [[bin]] in same Cargo crate, not Python wrapper
decisions.rationale: Zero runtime deps, fast startup, ships in AppImage

decisions.decision: Flat verb subcommands (cmux list-workspaces, cmux split, cmux send-text) not noun-verb
decisions.rationale: Match existing macOS cmux CLI style
Power users and scripting can access raw socket methods

decisions.decision: Binary named 'cmux', GUI app renamed to 'cmux-app'
decisions.rationale: CLI gets the primary name; clear distinction from GUI

decisions.decision: All command groups covered: core workspace/surface/pane, browser, notification, debug/system
decisions.rationale: Full coverage of all socket commands

next_action: Resume /gsd:discuss-phase 10 — continue from Output format gray area, then Socket discovery, then write CONTEXT.md
context_notes: In the middle of /gsd:discuss-phase 10. Completed CLI architecture (4 questions) and Command coverage (1 question, selected all groups). Two areas remain: Output format and Socket discovery. After discussion completes, need to write 10-CONTEXT.md and 10-DISCUSSION-LOG.md, commit, then run /gsd:plan-phase 10.
